title: Run AI Locally on Windows with New Microsoft AI APIs

description: What if you could run AI models directly in your browser without sending data to the cloud? In this episode, Alex and Sam break down Microsoft Edge’s experimental Prompt API and what it means for local AI.

title: Microsoft Edge’s On-Device AI Leap: New APIs & Models

description: Microsoft just got hit by a digital blight! In today's episode, Alex and Sam break down how the Miasma campaign rapidly disabled 73 Microsoft repositories in under two minutes, and what it means for Azure and open source security.

description: Windows 365 is officially pivoting for developers and AI agents at Build 2026! In this episode of Locally Hosted, Alex and Sam break down how Microsoft is eliminating setup friction so you can sign in and start coding instantly.
